verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Heard about a'Christian' man, Who beat his wife and child, Sweet at church but privately was wild; And someone spoke out bitter against a man of God, Split the church and everyone chose sides;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a world that's watching you, And a God who's watching too; Stop and hear this question, think it through.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Is your life worthy of the Gospel, Jesus' wife who you claim to be; If you choose to bear His name, Then I pray don't bring it shame, Please look and see, Is your life worthy?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A woman claims to speak in tongues, While dressing to appeal, Fails to sit and seek for something real; Sometimes it's hard to see in folks, If he is really there, Saying things that angels never dare;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It is best you never heard, Than to break my Savior's Word, Hopefully by something you'll be stirred.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Is your life worthy of the Gospel, Jesus' wife who you claim to be; If you choose to bear His name, Then I pray don't bring it shame, Please look and see, Is your life worthy?
